- **I9 fallback design**: When adapter mock has no `getLatestCapture` (BATS 72 only injects `sendKeys`), peek returns `{paneId, content: "", capturedAt: now(), byteLength: 0}` — NOT an error. - **I10 location choice**: REGRESSION GUARD comment placed adjacent to the per-action restriction `if` (in `execute()`), not in the gate top — guards the most-likely-to-be-removed block.
- **I11/I12 deferral pattern**: If a write-side action is left orchestrator-only, document with a code comment near the case body + cite the LOCKED decision ID, instead of silently skipping.
- **I8 gate split**: Kept the top-level gate and per-action restriction as separate `if` blocks (not combined into single tier check) so the cross-tier invariant is explicit and individually auditable.
